channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping at entrance to Firs Farm Wetlands, 21st March
item.description:
A lot of rubbish has been tipped near the entrance to Firs farm wetlands from the A10 A1 entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near fense, 21st March
item.description:
These bin bags have been dumped and left by my bins near my fense
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lake Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anti social parking obscuring view on corner., 21st March
item.description:
Cars constantly parking on double yellow lines on the corner of Cromwell Avenue and Lordship road creating a danger to motorists entering/ exiting Lordship( a no though road ) by blocking vision of cars travelling down Cromwell..... Inconsiderate drivers parking to "pop" into the shop are causing a danger to others.... If traffic wardens are not able to deter this, put up a camera and enforce rules , .....then see the money roll in from fines !
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Avenue, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes causing obstruction in residents bay please remove, 21st March
item.description:
Bikes causing obstruction in residents bay please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ainger Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London

item.description:
